name: create_task
description: Create a new task in the workspace with a title and optional properties like assignee, due date, project, or description.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name or title of the task.

parameters.name: projects
parameters.description: Array of project GIDs to add the task to.

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: User GID to assign the task to.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Additional notes or description for the task.
parameters.example: Add OAuth2 support for third-party integrations

data.name: Implement user authentication
data.notes: Add OAuth2 support for third-party integrations
